query: UNRWA mandate extension renewal date 2026 UN General Assembly resolution
topic: United Nations Relief and Works Agency for Palestine Refugees in the Near East

mako.raw:
{"query":"UNRWA mandate extension renewal date 2026 UN General Assembly resolution","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1432,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://english.wafa.ps/Pages/Details/164553","title":"UN General Assembly renews UNRWA mandate; Commissioner stresses need for funding to sustain services","content":"Lazzarini also expressed hope that the recent UN Security Council Resolution 2803 on Gaza would contribute to lasting peace and the respect of human rights.
The Commissioner noted that the situation in Gaza remains unstable after two years of continuous Israeli bombardment, repeated displacement, and a harsh blockade.","date":"19 nov 2025"},{"url":"https://en.yenisafak.com/world/un-general-assembly-votes-to-renew-unrwa-mandate-for-three-years-3711550","title":"UN General Assembly votes to renew UNRWA mandate for three years","content":"UNRWA Commissioner-General Philippe Lazzarini welcomed the vote, stating on X that it "reflects the broad solidarity of people across the world with Palestine Refugees." He described the renewal as an acknowledgment of the international community's responsibility to support refugees pending a lasting political solution.
UNRWA has faced acute funding shortages since Israel launched a campaign earlier this year alleging that some agency staff were involved in the October 7 attacks.
The allegations prompted several major donor countries, including the United States, to suspend or pause their contributions, crippling the agency's ability to deliver humanitarian aid and basic services in Gaza, the West Bank, Jordan, Lebanon, and Syria.
Established by the UN General Assembly over 70 years ago to assist Palestinians displaced in 1948, UNRWA is a cornerstone of the humanitarian response in the region.
The overwhelming vote to renew its mandate underscores its perceived irreplaceable role, even as political pressures and funding instability persist.","date":"6 dic 2025"},{"url":"https://www.middleeastmonitor.com/20251205-un-general-assembly-renews-mandate-of-un-agency-for-palestinian-refugees-for-3-years/","title":"UN General Assembly renews mandate of UN agency for Palestinian refugees for 3 years – Middle East Monitor","content":"UN General Assembly renews mandate of UN agency for Palestinian refugees for 3 years
Palestinians held a solidarity demonstration with the participation of national and Islamic groups and local community leaders in support of the United Nations Relief and Works Agency (UNRWA) for Palestinian refugees on November 4, 2025, in Khan Yunis, Gaza.
During a vote held at the General Assembly, the resolution received 151 votes in favor, 10 against, and 14 abstentions.
Welcoming the decision to renew its mandate, UNRWA chief Philippe Lazzarini said on US social media company X that the decision “reflects the broad solidarity of people across the world with Palestine Refugees.”
UNRWA was established by the UN General Assembly more than 70 years ago to assist Palestinians who were forcibly displaced from their land.
Following Israel’s accusations, several key donor nations, including the US, suspended or paused funding.
Unless otherwise stated in the article above, this work by Middle East Monitor is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.","date":"5 dic 2025"}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"UNRWA mandate extension renewal date 2026 UN General Assembly resolution","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.unrwa.org/newsroom/news-releases/un-general-assembly-renews-unrwa-mandate","title":"UN General Assembly Renews UNRWA Mandate","content":"Dec 14, 2022 — United Nations voted to extend the mandate for the United Nations Relief and Works Agency in the Near East (UNRWA) until 30 June 2026.","score":0.91156644,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://reliefweb.int/report/occupied-palestinian-territory/general-assembly-adopts-33-resolutions-recommended-its-fourth-committee-including-renewal-unrwa-mandate-until-30-june-2026","title":"General Assembly Adopts 33 Resolutions Recommended by Its Fourth Committee, Including Renewal of UNRWA Mandate until 30 June 2026 - occupied Palestinian territory | ReliefWeb","content":"Acting on the recommendation of its Fourth Committee (Special Political and Decolonization), the General Assembly today adopted 33 draft resolutions and two draft decisions, including texts concerning the mandate and operations of the United Nations Relief and Works Agency for Palestine Refugees in the Near East. The draft resolution on “Assistance to Palestine refugees” was adopted by a recorded vote of 157 in favour to 1 against (Israel), with 10 abstentions (Cameroon, Canada, Guatemala, Marshall Islands, Micronesia, Nauru, Palau, Papua New Guinea, United States, Uruguay). The resolution titled “Operations of the United Nations Relief and Works Agency for Palestine Refugees in the Near East”, adopted by a recorded vote of 157 in favour to 5 against (Canada, Israel, Marshall Islands, Micronesia, United States), with 4 abstentions (Cameroon, Guatemala, Papua New Guinea, Uruguay), had the Assembly decide to consider a gradual increase in the United Nations regular budget allocation to the Agency to support expenses for operational costs.","score":0.8993429,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.un.org/unispal/document/letter-from-unrwa-cg-17mar26","title":"Letter from UNRWA Commissioner-General Philippe ...","content":"Mar 25, 2026 — On 5 December 2025, the mandate was renewed for three years, but UNRWA's financial and operational situation has only worsened since then -","score":0.83225065,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.facebook.com/unrwa/posts/i-salute-the-overwhelming-vote-by-the-un-general-assembly-to-renew-unrwas-mandat/1338793948280934","title":"UNRWA - “I salute the overwhelming vote by the UN General...","content":"### **UNRWA**. “I salute the overwhelming vote by the UN General Assembly to renew UNRWA's mandate for three years. It reflects the broad solidarity of people across the world with #Palestine Refugees. It is also an acknowledgement of the international community’s responsibility to support the humanitarian and human development needs of Palestine Refugees pending a just and lasting solution to their decades-long plight.
